core_mechanism: spontaneous symmetry breaking via an order parameter acquiring a nonzero equilibrium value (Higgs mechanism): a dynamical field whose nonvanishing value breaks a continuous gauge symmetry and thereby generates emergent structure
brief_reason: The abstract frames the method as a 'Higgs-like model' in which order parameters (the soldering form and a fiber metric) acquire nonzero values that break the original gauge symmetry and produce new geometrical structure.
